endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/applicationWhitelistings
endpoints.description: Gets a list of application control VM/server groups for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/applicationWhitelistings/{groupName}
endpoints.description: Gets an application control VM/server group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation. Replace {{GROUPNAME}} with a real groupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/locations/{ascLocation}/applicationWhitelistings/{groupName}
endpoints.description: Update an application control VM/server group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASCLOCATION}} with a real asclocation. Replace {{GROUPNAME}} with a real groupname.
